seed_instruction: Draft an email to a hotel requesting room availability for next weekend.
org_constraint: The email must contain exactly five sentences.
new_constraint: The email must contain three paragraphs, each consisting of at least five sentences.
instruction: Draft an email to a hotel requesting room availability for next weekend. The email must contain exactly five sentences. The email must contain three paragraphs, each consisting of at least five sentences.
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Room Availability for Next Weekend

I am writing to inquire about room availability for next weekend. I would like to book a stay for two nights. Could you please check if you have any vacancies? I am looking for a double room with a view. Please let me know the current rates for these dates.

My travel dates are from Friday to Sunday. I would prefer a room on a higher floor. Is breakfast included in the standard nightly rate? I also need to know if parking is available. Please provide details regarding your check-in procedures.

I look forward to receiving your response very soon. Thank you for your assistance with this booking. Please inform me of any special weekend offers. I hope to stay at your beautiful hotel. I appreciate your time and your professional help.<turn|>
